title: Traditional British Ploughman's Lunch
description: A simple and satisfying British classic consisting of cheese, bread, and pickles. Perfect for a quick and easy lunch.
instructions: 1. Slice the bread into thick rounds.
2. Cut the Provolone and Ploughman's cheese into chunks.
3. Arrange the cheese, bread, pickles, and mixed greens on a platter.
4. Add sliced apple to the platter for a sweet contrast.
6. Offer a side of mustard or chutney for added flavor.
7. Consider adding other toppings such as cold meats or cheddar cheese.
8. If preparing ahead, store the ingredients separately and assemble just before serving.
